rule family="ipv4" source address="1.2.3.4" drop
rule family="ipv4" source address="10.0.0.0/24" reject
rule family="ipv6" source address="2001:db8::1" drop
rule family="ipv6" source address="2001:db8::/48" reject
rule family="ipv4" source address="192.0.2.10" accept
rule family="ipv4" source address="203.0.113.0/24" accept
rule family="ipv6" source address="2001:db8:cafe::5" accept
rule family="ipv4" source address="198.51.100.50" port port="22" protocol="tcp" accept
rule service name="ssh" accept
